message:
test(conformance): differential harness for fenv.h vs glibc

CONFORMANCE: libc fenv.h diff matrix.

7 functions, 4 tests, FENV_LOCK serializes (FPU control word is
per-thread; we mutate it). Original env saved + restored after
each test.

- round_modes_roundtrip: fesetround/fegetround across all 4 IEEE
  rounding modes (TONEAREST/DOWNWARD/UPWARD/TOWARDZERO) + invalid
  mode error parity
- exception_flags_roundtrip: clear → raise → test → clear → test
  for each of FE_INVALID/DIVBYZERO/OVERFLOW/UNDERFLOW/INEXACT
- fegetenv/fesetenv_roundtrip: set DOWNWARD → save → set UPWARD →
  restore env → verify DOWNWARD is back

fenv functions/constants declared via local extern blocks since the
libc crate doesn't re-export them on this version. Constants pinned
to glibc's x86_64 Linux <fenv.h> values.

0 divergences observed.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
